title: Two ways to work together.
intro: Depending on your stage and your team, we engage in two distinct ways. We tailor the scope to what you actually need.

tracks.name: Project delivery
tracks.scope: For teams that need a defined outcome — a migration, a rebuild, or an AI pilot.
tracks.body: We scope, architect and deliver a specific engagement end to end, with clear milestones and a fixed outcome. You get the result and the documentation to own it.

tracks.name: Ongoing partnership
tracks.scope: For teams that want a long-term cloud and AI partner across platform, FinOps and delivery.
tracks.body: A retained partnership frames our continuous collaboration across architecture, operations and optimization — we stay close to your roadmap.
points: A dedicated point of contact for your team
